label: Dataset
Interaction
Parameters
Potential
description: Dataset containing the parameters required to define the interaction potential for molecular simulations. This includes atom types, bonded parameters (bonds, angles, dihedrals), non-bonded parameters (Lennard-Jones, electrostatics), partial charges, and force-field topology information. The dataset enables reproducible molecular mechanics and molecular dynamics simulations.
format: TOP, ITP, PRM, XML, JSON, TXT
